data.title: Lunai Bioworks Executes $20M Strategic Transaction at Fixed $1.50 Conversion, Acquiring BBB Delivery Platform for CNS Alzheimer's Therapies with Broad CNS Delivery Applications
data.description: A strategic deal worth $20 million was revealed by Lunai Bioworks, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNAI) on March 26, 2026, in Sacramento, California. The agreement involves the acquisition of advanced blood-brain barrier (BBB) delivery technology along with central nervous system (CNS) Alzheimer's drug assets. This significant transaction marks a key development in the company's efforts to enhance its pharmaceutical portfolio and expand its capabilities in neurological treatments.

data.title: Omdia: YouTube Expected to Approach 3 Billion Global Users by 2027 as Netflix Surpasses 1 Billion
data.description: In London, a recent forecast by Omdia predicts that by 2027, Netflix will surpass 1 billion monthly active users worldwide, while YouTube is projected to near 3 billion users globally. Maria Rua Aguete, the Head of Media & Entertainment at Omdia, shared this data at Series Mania. This information underscores the significant impact global platforms are having on video consumption trends in Europe. Aguete, along with Justine Ryst, the Managing Director of YouTube France and Southern Europe, discussed these findings during a session at the event.

data.title: NYSE Lists Global X NYSE® 100 ETF, Expanding Access to Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
data.description: In New York, the Global X NYSE® 100 ETF (NYSX) has been listed on the NYSE, enabling investors to engage in the NYSE 100 Index's performance.

data.title: Prometheus Real Estate Group's Brickline Providing New High-End Experiences to Downtown San Mateo
data.description: Prometheus Real Estate Group has revealed the latest tenants set to open at Brickline, a fully-leased property in SAN MATEO, Calif. The grand openings feature upscale dining and wellness-focused offerings, marking an exciting development in the property's lineup. The announcement, made on March 26, 2026, highlights the diverse range of businesses now operating in the area. This next wave of tenants brings added vibrancy to the mixed-use property, enhancing the overall experience for visitors and residents alike.

data.title: Bybit Launches AED Fiat Referral Boost Campaign with 7,500 USDT Prize Pool
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on March 26, 2026 - Bybit, the cryptocurrency exchange with the second-highest trading volume globally, has introduced the AED Fiat Referral Boost program. This initiative offers special rewards solely for AED fiat deposits made on Bybit. This program is set to run from the launch date until April 26, 2026. Participants who engage in this initiative have the opportunity to receive additional benefits...

data.title: Owlet Joins Babylist to Donate Product to Children's Hospital Los Angeles in Support of Make March Matter Campaign
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT), a leading provider of smart infant monitoring solutions, has partnered with Babylist to support Children's Hospital Los Angeles in its 11th annual Make March Matter campaign. This campaign aims to raise funds for critical pediatric care at one of the nation's top children's hospitals. The event took place at the Babylist Showroom in Beverly Hills, where Owlet's mission of ensuring every baby receives the best start in life was highlighted. Owlet's contribution underscores its commitment to supporting families in need, aligning with the hospital's goal of providing essential healthcare services to children.

data.title: BiomX Launches Security Subsidiary in Israel and Will Initially Invest Over $3 million In Its Operations
data.description: An initiative has been launched to enter Israel's expanding autonomous AI sector for defense, firefighting, and first response. The move comes amid significant growth in these fields within the country. This groundbreaking initiative will involve investing in cutting-edge technology and expertise to enhance capabilities in these crucial areas. Israel's autonomous AI defense, firefighting, and first response industries are booming, and this initiative is set to play a key role in further advancing these sectors.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics Receives Approval from Israeli Ministry of Health to Initiate Phase 2/3 Clinical Trial of SIL204 in Locally Advanced Pancreatic Cancer
data.description: A major regulatory development has been reached, signaling progress into clinical-stage development of a new generation RNAi therapy. This therapy utilizes a unique systemic delivery method to target prevalent KRAS-driven cancers, addressing a significant medical need. This advancement marks a crucial step in potentially providing treatment for numerous patients affected by this type of cancer.

data.title: NSPJ Announces New Mission Statement
data.description: NSPJ Architects, headquartered in Prairie Village, Kansas, known for its tradition of exceptional design, aims to improve lives through innovative design practices. The firm, established in 1955, focuses on creating vibrant living spaces that cater to modern lifestyles. Specializing in architecture and landscape architecture, NSPJ Architects has gained a reputation for excellence in design. Their commitment to crafting distinctive environments has led to the successful completion of over 1000 projects. The firm's dedication to creativity and functionality has garnered them numerous awards and recognition within the industry. Through their unique approach to architectural design, NSPJ Architects continues to set new standards for creating exceptional and inspiring spaces.
